hero.title: Compliance, governance and cybersecurity resilience
hero.p: Piqueou helps organizations achieve compliance and strengthen their digital governance. We support you in preparing and succeeding in your CMMC, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, NIS2, Law 25, GDPR certification journey, while offering strategic support with a fractional CISO, CIO or DPO.
hero.stat1.label: Compliance frameworks covered
hero.stat2.label: Strategic roles offered on a fractional basis
hero.stat3.label: Complementary expertise: ITAR and controlled goods
about.title: A strategic partner for your compliance and cybersecurity
about.lead: Piqueou supports organizations in managing digital risks, achieving regulatory compliance, and preparing for international cybersecurity certifications.
about.p: Our approach combines strategic expertise with operational support. We help businesses structure their IT governance, meet regulatory requirements, and prepare effectively for audits and certifications such as CMMC, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, NIS2, Law 25 and GDPR.
about.feature1.title: Compliance and Certifications
about.feature1.p: Full support to prepare and achieve international certifications and compliance audits.
about.feature2.title: Fractional IT Leadership
about.feature2.p: Access to fractional CISO, CIO or DPO to strengthen governance and technology strategy.
about.feature3.title: Regulatory Dossiers
about.feature3.p: Preparation and organization of files required for certifications related to controlled goods and ITAR regulations.
about.feature4.title: Governance and Risk Management
about.feature4.p: Structuring policies, processes and controls to strengthen cyber resilience and organizational maturity.
process.title: Project Implementation Methodology
process.lead: Piqueou supports organizations in implementing cybersecurity, compliance and IT governance projects with a structured, pragmatic and results-driven approach.
process.p: Our methodology ensures efficient project execution, from initial analysis to control maintenance, ensuring alignment with regulatory requirements and business objectives.
process.step1.title: Initial Assessment
process.step1.p: Analysis of your IT environment, security posture and compliance level to identify gaps and priorities.
process.step2.title: Strategic Planning
process.step2.p: Development of a clear roadmap including priorities, required resources and project milestones.
process.step3.title: Implementation
process.step3.p: Deployment of the controls, policies and technical solutions needed for project success and compliance.
process.step4.title: Validation and Audit
process.step4.p: Compliance verification, evidence preparation and support during audits or assessments.
process.step5.title: Continuous Improvement
process.step5.p: Performance monitoring, control adjustments and long-term support to maintain compliance.
cta.title: Ready to strengthen your compliance and cybersecurity?
cta.p: Regulatory requirements and digital risks are constantly evolving. Piqueou supports organizations in preparing for certifications, IT governance and risk management to protect their operations and ensure compliance.

why.title: Why choose Piqueou for your compliance and cybersecurity projects?
why.lead: We combine technical expertise and regulatory knowledge to secure your operations and prepare your certifications.
why.p: Our personalized approach ensures that every client benefits from strategic, operational and internationally compliant support.
why.f1.title: Sector Expertise
why.f1.p: In-depth knowledge of regulatory frameworks: CMMC, ISO 27001, SOC2 Type II, NIS2, Law 25, GDPR.
why.f2.title: Data-Driven Approach
why.f2.p: Precise risk analysis and actionable recommendations to secure your IT assets and sensitive data.
why.f3.title: On-Time Delivery
why.f3.p: Our engagements are planned to deliver your compliance and certification projects on time.
why.f4.title: Guaranteed Results
why.f4.p: Full support through to obtaining your certifications and achieving your security objectives.

faq.q1: What is a fractional CISO / CIO / DPO?
faq.a1: It is a senior cybersecurity or IT governance expert who supports your company on a part-time basis to define strategies, manage risks and oversee compliance without a permanent hire.
faq.q2: Which compliance frameworks does Piqueou support?
faq.a2: We work with the following certifications and standards: CMMC, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, NIS2, Law 25 and GDPR. We tailor our support to your sector and needs.
faq.q3: How does the certification support process work?
faq.a3: We conduct a gap analysis, implement the necessary policies and controls, prepare your teams and provide follow-up through to the final audit.
faq.q4: Does Piqueou offer services for small businesses?
faq.a4: Yes, our services are tailored to SMEs and growing organizations. Fractional support provides access to senior leadership without high fixed costs.
faq.q5: How can I contact Piqueou for a consultation?
faq.a5: You can fill out the contact form on our page or click the "Contact us" button below to schedule a free consultation with our experts.
faq.card.title: Didn't find your answer?
faq.card.p: Our team is available to answer your questions about compliance, certifications and IT support. Feel free to contact us for a personalized consultation.

cmmc.page.title: CMMC Certification
cmmc.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in meeting the requirements of the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC). We help you prepare your processes, secure your information and succeed in your audits to meet the standards of the U.S. Department of Defense.
cmmc.section.title: CMMC Certifications & Cybersecurity Excellence
cmmc.section.p: Piqueou supports organizations in preparing for and achieving CMMC certifications to strengthen their cybersecurity posture and ensure compliance with U.S. Department of Defense standards.
cmmc.badge.title: Certified Cybersecurity Partner
cmmc.badge.p: Recognized expertise in preparing organizations for CMMC assessments.
cmmc.level1.title: CMMC Level 1
cmmc.level1.p: Guidance to achieve basic security practices and initial compliance.
cmmc.level3.title: CMMC Level 3
cmmc.level3.p: Advanced preparation to manage risks and demonstrate mature, controlled security.
cmmc.level5.title: CMMC Level 5
cmmc.level5.p: Full support to achieve an advanced and sustainable level of cybersecurity, meeting the most stringent requirements.

iso.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in achieving compliance with the ISO 27001 standard, by structuring your policies, processes and controls to ensure information security and succeed in your certification audits.

loi25.page.title: Law 25 / GDPR Compliance
loi25.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in achieving compliance with personal data protection regulations, including Law 25 in Quebec and the GDPR in Europe. We help organizations structure their data protection policies, reduce legal risks and demonstrate compliance during audits or regulatory assessments.
loi25.section.title: Law 25 / GDPR Compliance
loi25.section.p1: Piqueou supports organizations in achieving compliance with personal data protection regulations, including Law 25 in Quebec and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in Europe.
loi25.section.p2: Our approach identifies gaps, implements data protection policies and structures the governance needed to protect sensitive information and reduce regulatory risks.
loi25.badge.title: Data Protection
loi25.badge.p: Implementation of policies, procedures and controls to ensure compliance with Law 25 and GDPR requirements.
loi25.card1.title: Compliance Analysis
loi25.card1.p: Analysis of your personal data management practices to identify gaps with Law 25 and GDPR requirements.
loi25.card2.title: Data Governance
loi25.card2.p: Implementation of data protection policies, processing registers, consent mechanisms and incident management procedures.
loi25.card3.title: Audit Preparation
loi25.card3.p: Preparation of documentation and support to demonstrate compliance during audits or regulatory assessments.

ciso.page.title: CISO / CIO
ciso.page.subtitle: Piqueou offers part-time cybersecurity and information technology governance leadership services. Our experts act as CISO, CIO or Data Protection Officer (DPO) to help organizations structure their digital strategy, strengthen security and ensure regulatory compliance.
ciso.content.title: Strategic cybersecurity and IT governance leadership
ciso.content.p1: Piqueou offers part-time cybersecurity and information technology governance leadership services. Our experts act as CISO, CIO or Data Protection Officer (DPO) to help organizations structure their digital strategy, strengthen security and ensure regulatory compliance.
ciso.content.p2: This service is for organizations that want to benefit from high-level expertise without the costs associated with hiring a full-time executive. Our vCISO and vCIO integrate with your existing teams to bring strategic vision, strengthen your security posture and align your IT practices with your business objectives.

ciso.feature1.title: Cybersecurity leadership (vCISO)
ciso.feature1.p: Defining and steering the security strategy, risk management and oversight of security incidents.
ciso.feature2.title: IT Governance (vCIO)
ciso.feature2.p: Aligning technology strategy with business objectives, IT portfolio management and resource optimization.
ciso.feature3.title: Data Protection (DPO)
ciso.feature3.p: Implementation of data protection policies, compliance with Law 25, GDPR and other applicable regulations.

cyber.page.title: Cybersecurity and Regulatory Compliance
cyber.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in managing their digital risks and complying with regulatory requirements. We help you implement robust cybersecurity practices, prepare your certifications and ensure the governance of your information systems in accordance with international standards such as ISO 27001, SOC2 Type II, CMMC, NIS2, Law 25 and GDPR.
cyber.content.title: Cybersecurity and regulatory compliance
cyber.content.p1: Piqueou supports organizations in complying with legal and regulatory cybersecurity requirements. We help structure processes, secure data and strengthen IT governance to reduce risks and ensure compliance.
cyber.content.p2: Our interventions cover key standards and regulations: ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, CMMC, NIS2, Law 25, GDPR. From initial assessment to full audit preparation, we guide you at every step for lasting and effective compliance.

cyber.feature2.title: Controls implementation
cyber.feature2.p: Definition and application of the policies and processes necessary for compliance.
cyber.feature3.title: Audit preparation
cyber.feature3.p: Supporting your teams and consolidating evidence to succeed in audits.

gov.page.title: Governance and risk management
gov.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in implementing solid governance and digital risk management practices. We help identify, assess and reduce operational, regulatory and cyber risks while strengthening strategic decision-making and organizational resilience.
gov.content.title: Governance and risk management
gov.content.p1: Piqueou supports organizations in optimizing their governance and managing their digital and operational risks. We help structure decision-making processes, identify and prioritize risks, and define appropriate mitigation strategies.
gov.content.p2: Our approach covers risk assessment, implementation of controls and internal policies, as well as support to ensure compliance with applicable standards and regulations.

conformity.page.title: Compliance and certifications
conformity.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in their cybersecurity compliance and information governance approach. We help organizations prepare for and succeed in recognized certifications such as CMMC, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, as well as compliance with NIS2, Law 25 and GDPR regulations. Our approach covers gap analysis, implementation of necessary controls and full audit preparation.
conformity.content.title: Compliance and certifications
conformity.content.p1: Piqueou supports organizations in their compliance efforts to structure their governance, reduce digital risks and succeed in their certification audits. Our approach makes regulatory requirements concrete, applicable and adapted to your operational reality.
conformity.content.p2: We help prepare organizations for frameworks and obligations such as CMMC, ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, NIS2, Law 25 and GDPR. From gap analysis to final audit preparation, we build with you a clear, documented, results-oriented roadmap.
conformity.features.title: What the service includes
conformity.feature1.title: Gap analysis
conformity.feature1.p: Assessment of your current situation against the target framework requirements to identify priority gaps.
conformity.feature2.title: Documentation and policies
conformity.feature2.p: Structuring of policies, procedures, registers and evidence necessary to support compliance and audits.
conformity.feature3.title: Audit preparation
conformity.feature3.p: Team preparation, evidence consolidation and support through to the official assessment or external review.

itar.page.title: Controlled Goods and ITAR Compliance
itar.page.subtitle: Piqueou supports organizations in preparing and organizing the steps necessary to obtain certifications related to controlled goods and ITAR (International Traffic in Arms Regulations). We help organizations structure their processes, implement required controls and prepare the necessary files to meet government and industry requirements.
itar.content.title: Controlled goods compliance and ITAR regulations
itar.content.p1: Organizations that work with sensitive technologies, military products or defense-related components must comply with strict regulations such as the Canadian Controlled Goods Program and the U.S. ITAR (International Traffic in Arms Regulations).
itar.content.p2: Piqueou supports organizations in preparing their compliance files, implementing necessary controls and organizing internal processes to meet regulatory and industry requirements.
itar.features.title: Included services
itar.feature1.title: Compliance analysis
itar.feature1.p: Assessment of your organization against the requirements of controlled goods programs and ITAR regulations.
itar.feature2.title: File preparation
itar.feature2.p: Assistance in assembling and organizing the documents necessary for registration and regulatory compliance.
itar.feature3.title: Controls implementation
itar.feature3.p: Deployment of security policies, access controls, export management and team training.
